content:
type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Added FILTERS registry + register_filter/unregister_filter; merged into env.filters in _template_from_str and _template_from_file via env.filters.update(FILTERS) before builtin filters so builtins win. Will adjust to use your create_jinja_env helper if you land one - want global registry filters applied first, then your local filters param override on top.
